puzzle.hint: It can be a gentle mercy or a furious punishment.
puzzle.arabicVerse: وَلَئِنْ أَرْسَلْنَا رِيحًۭا فَرَأَوْهُ مُصْفَرًّۭا لَّظَلُّوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ يَكْفُرُونَ
puzzle.verse: 30:51 — But if We should send a [bad] wind and they saw [their crops] turned yellow, they would remain thereafter disbelievers.
